method_records.name: SCM (SyntheticControl / SyntheticControlCVXPY)
method_records.research_basis: Abadie-Diamond-Hainmueller synthetic control: convex donor weights on pre-treatment outcomes, counterfactual for treated unit(s).
required_assumptions: Donor pool can approximate treated pre-trends (no structural break at treatment).
Treated units excluded from donor weighting.
Sparse/simplex or ridge-regularized weights stable (OSQP path).
method_records.implementation_behavior: Default `full_model=False`: pre-period fit via split_control_test_units; CVXPY/OSQP simplex weights; treated excluded from controls. `full_model=True` fits on full timeline — documented D2 fail-risk (INV-D2-001).

deviations.note: Conceptually leaks post-treatment into weight estimation.

deviations.item: Geo multi-treated panels without per-unit SCM theory bridge
deviations.note: Runs mechanically; estimand is per treated unit path, not pooled ATT without bridge.

method_records.inference_semantics: Estimator point path; uncertainty via separate inference modes.
forbidden_claims: Universal SCM validity for all geo designs without geometry card.
Lift detection from JK alone without null-monitor framing.
required_fixes_before_production: Govern full_model paths or block in production exports.

method_records.name: AugSynth / AugSynthCVXPY
method_records.research_basis: Augmented SCM (Ben-Michael et al.): SCM weights + outcome model for residuals; addresses bias when SCM fit is imperfect.
required_assumptions: Ridge (or chosen) outcome model correctly specified on donor residuals.
min_donors and correlation filter appropriate for panel.
method_records.implementation_behavior: Inner SyntheticControlCVXPY + Ridge on residualized treated outcomes; same full_model leakage risk as SCM on inner solver.

deviations.note: ~−0.034 vs 0.10 truth under contamination — not modeled.

method_records.supported_estimand: relative_att_post point path; JK mirrors SCM conservatism
method_records.inference_semantics: Point strong; JK null-monitor only (not lift).
forbidden_claims: Generalize point recovery on default DGP to spillover geo.
required_fixes_before_production: D5-INST-AUGSYNTH-002 for Kfold if promoted beyond diagnostic.

method_records.name: TBR (class TBR, not TBRRidge)
method_records.research_basis: Google geo experiments TBR: regression of treated on control aggregate using pre-period fit — intended for **aggregated** test/control series.
required_assumptions: Exactly one treated and one control aggregate series.
method_records.implementation_behavior: Assert len(treated_units)==1 and num_control_units==1; LinearRegression on pre-period. Geo PowerAnalysis uses TBRRidge on agg panel, **not** class TBR.

deviations.item: recovery_runner labels TBR but factory is TBRRidge

method_records.supported_estimand: aggregate treated vs control level shift (not unit SCM ATT)
method_records.inference_semantics: Registry JK/Kfold on 1×1 panel — atypical vs paper.
forbidden_claims: Equating TBR with TBRRidge or SCM unit readout.

method_records.name: TBRRidge
method_records.research_basis: TBR family with ridge on multiple control unit series — geo product extension for multi-unit panels and PowerAnalysis MDE path.
required_assumptions: Pre-period ridge fit meaningful for post extrapolation.
method_records.implementation_behavior: Unit-level multi-control ridge; also used on 2-row aggregate for geo power. Point scale differs from SCM+JK at null (D5-TBRIDGE).

deviations.item: Geo power MDE vs SCM+JK null-monitor

method_records.supported_estimand: unit path effect or agg2 power proxy — not interchangeable
method_records.inference_semantics: Via registry Kfold/BRB/JK — each needs own validity row.
forbidden_claims: Governed lift or MMM from Kfold on agg2.
Null FPR match implies same estimand as SCM+JK.
required_fixes_before_production: Estimand bridge doc for agg2 vs unit.

method_records.name: BayesianTBR / BayesianTBRHorseShoe
method_records.research_basis: Bayesian regression / horseshoe priors for high-dimensional controls; MCMC (NUTS).
method_records.implementation_behavior: fit_model runs NUTS; ImpactAnalyzer registry 'Bayesian' uses JAX quantiles on predict() — **not** full posterior from MCMC path.

deviations.note: Cannot claim BayesianTBR paper fidelity via registry mode.

required_fixes_before_production: Bridge or block registry Bayesian on BayesianTBR.

method_records.name: DID (TWFE + native bootstrap)
method_records.research_basis: Two-way fixed effects DID; cluster/block bootstrap for inference.
method_records.implementation_behavior: TWFE on long panel; moving block bootstrap on post path; cumulative ATT intervals; overrides registry — not registry bootstrap mode.
method_records.supported_estimand: cumulative_att / mean post ATT — not SCM relative ATT
forbidden_claims: Relative ATT lift compare to SCM+JK.

method_records.name: TROP
method_records.research_basis: Triply robust panel estimators (recent econometrics literature); nuclear norm + unit/time penalties.
method_records.implementation_behavior: Research estimator; validation runner skipped; aggregates multi-treated y for display.
required_fixes_before_production: Full D5 OC + Track B instrument if promoted.

method_records.name: UnitJackKnife / JKP
method_records.research_basis: Leave-one-out donor stability for SCM-style counterfactuals (Abadie et al. permutation/JK literature).
required_assumptions: LOO refit stable; donors exchangeable for diagnostic.
method_records.implementation_behavior: LOO on control units refits estimator; post INV-D3-001 uses correct LOO target. Conservative null monitor (FPR≈0, power≈0 on batteries).

deviations.item: Not classical sampling CI for ATT

method_records.name: Placebo (in-space)
method_records.research_basis: Placebo-in-space: reassign treatment to control units; build null for test statistic.
method_records.implementation_behavior: Pointwise placebo paths + optional inversion CI; path_interval_type=placebo_band. TBR class blocked in impl.

deviations.item: Inversion CI can be mistaken for ATT CI

method_records.supported_estimand: placebo null envelope — not pooled ATT

method_records.name: KFold (panel time-series CV)
method_records.research_basis: Chernozhukov et al. synthetic control CV / cross-validation for bias correction.
required_assumptions: CV folds respect time structure (implementation uses horizon folds).
method_records.implementation_behavior: Aggregates multi-treated residuals for TBRRidge; debias optional. Geo power uses Kfold on agg2 — restricted.

deviations.note: Document geometry when multiple treated units.

method_records.supported_estimand: confidence_interval on effect path (not always relative ATT)

method_records.name: BlockResidualBootstrap (BRB)
method_records.research_basis: Block bootstrap for time-series panels; residual resampling.
method_records.implementation_behavior: Cumulative effect primary for multi-unit; SCM uses lower default n_bootstrap.

method_records.name: Conformal
method_records.research_basis: Distribution-free predictive intervals under exchangeability — often violated in panels.
method_records.implementation_behavior: Registry mode; grid null search on post mean — diagnostic.
required_fixes_before_production: D5 conformal OC if used in prod.

method_records.name: Registry Bayesian (JAX)
method_records.research_basis: Posterior predictive intervals from MCMC — **not** what registry does.
method_records.implementation_behavior: Quantiles of predict() outputs after single fit — not NUTS on BayesianTBR.

required_before_mmm: Resolve INV-D2-001 / INV-015 / recovery_runner TBR factory

findings.summary: Synthetic OC batteries do not establish paper fidelity — only code+geometry+estimand alignment.
SCM+JK is the only calibration-eligible path; conceptually null-monitor not lift.
Placebo and JK answer different estimands — governance must keep placebo_band separate.
TBR (aggregate) vs TBRRidge (unit/agg power) are different research objects.
